overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a mountain trail through grassy terrain with pine trees and rock formations. The character encounters a horse rider and a wagon on the path during late afternoon lighting with long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with large rock outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation towering above the trail on the left side
tall evergreen trees scattered along the hillside
narrow dirt path winding through the grassy terrain
green grassy hills covering the mountain slopes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a grassy mountain landscape. A massive rock outcrop dominates the left side of the frame while pine trees scatter the hillsides. The late afternoon sun casts long shadows across the path as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with distant peaks

events.description: trail curves right and opens into a wider valley view with distant mountains becoming visible
sun becomes directly visible ahead creating strong backlight and lens flare effects

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail as the landscape opens into a wide valley with mountain views

entered.detail: hazy blue mountain peaks visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The trail curves and opens into a wide mountain valley. The large rock formation falls behind as distant mountain peaks become visible on the horizon. The sun sits low in the sky ahead, creating a warm backlight and lens flare as the character continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley trail with wagon traffic and distinctive dead tree

events.description: rider on white horse approaches from the left and passes by on the trail
horse-drawn wagon approaches from the left and passes by on the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail as a horse rider and wagon pass by in the opposite direction, then continuing toward a dead tree

notable_agents.action: riding a white horse along the trail, passing by the character
horse-drawn wooden wagon moving along the trail with driver seated on top

entered.detail: large leafless tree with twisted branches standing alone in the grassland ahead
parallel ruts in the dirt from previous wagon traffic

segments.scene_description: The character encounters traffic on the trail as a horse rider and then a wagon pass by on the left. The path shows visible wagon ruts, and ahead stands a distinctive dead tree with twisted branches. The character continues walking toward this landmark as the surrounding grassland stretches out under the afternoon sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a narrow, shadowed path into a wide, sun-drenched valley. It begins with the character walking past a massive rock outcrop and scattered pine trees, where the late afternoon sun casts long shadows across the dirt. As the trail curves, the rock formation recedes and the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountain peaks and a warm, backlit horizon filled with lens flare. The scene then shifts as the character encounters a horse rider and a wagon passing on the left, moving along visible ruts in the earth. Finally, the camera follows the character across the stretching grasslands toward a distinctive dead tree with twisted branches under the glowing afternoon sky.
